summary: Backend Sprint 2 testing for Sit Happens CRM: validated new check-in/check-out, report card, vaccine alerts endpoints, and dashboard roster changes. Also re-ran iteration_1 regression suite (auth/clients/dogs/bookings/portal/authz). 30/30 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: vaccine_alerts: 'expiring' branch in /vaccine-alerts uses 'elif r <= in_thirty' which also matches today (r == today) — currently labels today's expiry as 'expiring' rather than 'expired'. Borderline OK since today is not strictly < today, but worth confirming product intent.

dashboard_stats.health_flags uses 'r <= in_thirty' without an upper-bound check, so dogs with rabies way in the future would also be flagged only if r < today OR r <= in_thirty — since in_thirty is 30 days out, future dates beyond that are correctly excluded. No bug, but the logic chain reads awkwardly; consider refactoring to mirror vaccine_alerts statuses.
DismissIn model is defined but unused — endpoint /vaccine-alerts/{dog_id}/dismiss takes only path param. Dead code; safe to remove.
check_in/check_out do not enforce booking status (e.g., only 'approved' should be check-in-able). Currently any status including 'cancelled' or 'rejected' can be checked in/out. Consider guarding.
save_report_card allows creating a report card for any booking regardless of status. Acceptable per current product flow but worth documenting.
server.py is now ~710 lines — approaching the recommended 700-line threshold; consider splitting into routers (auth, clients, dogs, bookings, dashboard) for maintainability.
test_credentials: admin@sithappens.com / admin123 (verified working). Portal users are created per-test with unique emails.
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates TEST_S2_* clients/dogs and portal users via unique uuids, cleaned up automatically in module-scoped fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 2 backend is green. Two pytest files live in /app/backend/tests/: test_sithappens.py (iteration 1 regression, 20 tests) and test_sprint2.py (10 tests covering check-in/out, report card, vaccine alerts, dashboard roster). Cleanup removes TEST_* and TEST_S2_* clients. Frontend not tested per request — Dashboard.jsx vaccine banner + check-in board + report card modal and Portal.jsx report card render were only smoke-tested manually by the main agent.
